visualAccessibility.name: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
visualAccessibility.rootCause: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
solution:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.93 (foreground color: #ac0c90, background color: #0e0e16, font size: 7.8pt (10.4px), font weight: bold). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

visualAccessibility.name: All page content should be contained by landmarks
visualAccessibility.rootCause: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
visualAccessibility.codeSnippet: 🏪 Small business? We have special rates to get you started.
solution:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks

whatsGood: Elements must only use supported ARIA attributes
ARIA role should be appropriate for the element
ARIA attributes must be used as specified for the element's role
Deprecated ARIA roles must not be used
aria-hidden="true" must not be present on the document body
ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements
Elements must only use permitted ARIA attributes
Required ARIA attributes must be provided
ARIA roles used must conform to valid values
ARIA attributes must conform to valid values
ARIA attributes must conform to valid names
Inline text spacing must be adjustable with custom stylesheets
Buttons must have discernible text
Page must have means to bypass repeated blocks
Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
Documents must have <title> element to aid in navigation
Headings should not be empty
Form field must not have multiple label elements
Heading levels should only increase by one
<html> element must have a lang attribute
<html> element must have a valid value for the lang attribute
Images must have alternative text
Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text
Form elements should have a visible label
Form elements must have labels
Banner landmark should not be contained in another landmark
Contentinfo landmark should not be contained in another landmark
Main landmark should not be contained in another landmark
Document should not have more than one banner landmark
Document should not have more than one contentinfo landmark
Document should not have more than one main landmark
Document should have one main landmark
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination
Links must have discernible text
Users should be able to zoom and scale the text up to 500%
Zooming and scaling must not be disabled
Interactive controls must not be nested
Page should contain a level-one heading
All page content should be contained by landmarks
[role="img"] elements must have alternative text
Scrollable region must have keyboard access
<svg> elements with an img role must have alternative text
